take-up-minutes: It may take up to minutes
could-not-find-info: Could not find the current user information in the database.
could-not-find-info-id: Could not find information about the IDs.
could-not-find-last-model: Could not find the last used model.
could-not-find-model: The model used was not found or is not available.
price-lower-cache: Price may be lower with cached response
server-not-found-database: Server not found in the database! Creating... ({0}/{1})
unable-create-server: Could not create this server in the database! Please try again later.
role-eliminated: Oops! It seems the role to access this command has been eliminated.
role-missing: Oops! You need to have the {0} role to perform this task.
active-conversation: Oops! I detected an active conversation! To create a new one, end the previous conversation.
model-unavailable: Oops! The selected model is currently unavailable.
history-chat-desc: Will save the message history, allowing corrections.
history-image-desc: Will not save the message history, preventing corrections.
chat-description-question: Enter your question to start the conversation.
chat-description-tts: Enter your phrase to generate audio.
history-tts-description: Will not save the message history, preventing corrections.
chat-description-image: Enter your phrase to generate the image.
chat-description-default: Enter the parameter to start your request.
chat-description-rules: Be respectful in the current channel.
chat-description-time: It may take up to minute(s) to process your request.
invalid-option: Could not find a valid option. Please try again!
invalid-options: Could not find the options. Please try again!
invalid-option-value: Could not find the value in the option. Please try again!
config-updated-unsuccess: The options were not saved to the database, possibly because there is already an equal value stored.
content-policy-violation: Your request was rejected due to our security system. Your prompt may contain text not allowed by our security system.
rate-limit-exceeded: You have exceeded the allowed request limit in a given period. Please wait a moment before trying again.
invalid-request: There was a problem with your request. Please check if all parameters are correct and try again.
authentication-error: Authentication error. Please make sure your credentials are correct and valid.
server-error: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
timeout: The request took too long to process and was interrupted. Please try again.
could-not-find-info-token: Could not find information about the Tokens.
could-not-find-token: Oops! It seems the current server does not have a pre-configured token.
function-call: Could not generate because the system is slow. (FunctionCall)
unable-generate-order: Could not generate the request. Reason: {0}
unable-perform-task: Oops! An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
unable-find-chat: The current chat could not be found in the database due to a technical problem. The channel needs to be removed manually, but you can create a new chat at any time!
model-not-found: Could not identify the model. Please try again!
close-chat: Thank you for using **Ares**! Closing the conversation...
unable-get-member: Oops! Could not find your profile information.
not-chat-owner: It looks like you don't own this channel.
chat-incompatible-option: It looks like the current chat does not support these options.
model-desc-gpt-4.5: Largest GPT model for creative tasks and agentic planning.
model-desc-o1-pro: A version of of that uses maximum compute for more reliable responses.
model-desc-o1: Reasoning model designed to solve hard problems across domains.
model-desc-o3-mini: Faster and cheaper reasoning model particularly good at coding, math, and science.
model-desc-gpt-4o: High-intelligence flagship model for complex, multi-step tasks.
model-desc-gpt-4o-mini: Affordable and intelligent small model for fast, lightweight tasks.
model-desc-gpt-4o-s: Fast, up-to-date answers with clear and relevant citations from the web.
model-desc-gemini-2.5-pro-preview: Advanced reasoning, multimodal understanding, and sophisticated coding.
model-desc-gemini-2.0-flash: Real-time multimodal generation with a focus on speed and efficiency.
model-desc-gemini-2.0-flash-lite: Fast and cost-effective model for lightweight, low-latency tasks.
model-desc-gemini-1.5-flash: Quick and versatile performance across a wide range of tasks.
model-desc-gemini-1.5-flash-8b: Optimized for high-volume, low-intelligence tasks at low cost.
model-desc-gemini-1.5-pro: Built for complex reasoning and high-level intelligence tasks.
model-desc-imagen-3.0-generate-002: Our most advanced model for high-quality image generation.
model-dev-mode: Hehe! The current model is still in development mode.
premium-chat-limit: Oops! Even if you have the premium status, there is a limit of 5 conversations.
ping-description: Current ping of the connection to the gateway.
config-token-description: Configure the tokens for the current server.
config-id-description: Configure channels and permissions for the current server.
config-id-role-member: Enter the ID of the member role.
config-id-role-usage: Enter the ID of the role allowed to use the chats.
config-id-role-exclusive: Enter the ID of the role allowed to use exclusive chats.
config-id-channel-setup: Enter the ID of the channel where the chat embed will be displayed.
config-id-channel-log: Enter the ID of the channel where the bot logs will be stored.
config-id-category-chats: Enter the ID of the category where the generated chat channels will be kept.
config-lang-description: Choose the application language for this server.
setup-description: Choose the type of setup to be performed in the current channel.
setup-option: Choose the type of setup to be performed in the current channel.
